subject: docs(todo): tighten all stale claims, add per-repo tasks for new items
body:
Fixes discovered in review pass:
- canva-grid and repo-tor no longer claim "fully compliant" — both
  now Missing ICON_CACHE_BUST plus cross-fleet items
- budgy-ting intro now lists all remaining items including cross-fleet
- four-ems CLAUDE.md Confirm line corrected from ~475 to ~630 lines
- Audit date corrected: re-audit was 2026-04-16, not 2026-04-10
- Cross-cutting gaps section rewritten: "Only glow-props is fully
  clean", added HISTORY.md removal as item #2, Communication section
  propagation folded into CLAUDE.md alignment scope, counts updated

Per-repo additions:
- ICON_CACHE_BUST subsection added to all 9 PWA repos (Vite template
  for 7, Expo/Metro template for few-lap and synctone)
- Communication section propagation added to all 10 downstream repos
  (folded into existing CLAUDE.md alignment tasks for 7 repos,
  standalone subsection for canva-grid, budgy-ting, repo-tor)
- SESSION_NOTES.md rewritten for this session

Tags: documentation, audit, cleanup, patterns, cross-project
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
